title: Vivi Tries to Carry Everyone
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on vivi tries to carry everyone, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Tries to Carry Everyone. Luffy refuses to let Vivi carry the country alone, forcing her to face what it will actually take to stop Crocodile. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: About this operation utopia,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Could you hold up for a sec...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How did you get in here!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Mr. 3! Where did you spring from!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I was certain I finished you off!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: let him talk, Mr. 2!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Where did I "spring from?" How rude...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I've been trailing you ever since at Spider's Cafe, you know...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I hitched onto the back of Banchi's carriage, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: A pleasure to meet you for the first time, boss...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I've come here in hopes of being given a second chance, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After failing to carry out my mission, it's only natural that you'd seek to eliminate me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But that is precisely why I then headed for Spider's Cafe, the meeting place for officer agents...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You failed... To carry out your orders...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What're you talking about!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Like I was saying, I failed to eliminate Princess Vivi,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And the Straw hat pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You didn't kill them!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You mean to tell me they're still alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Umm...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then what the hell was that dender- mushi call about!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You told me over the phone that Vivi and the pirates had been taken care of!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Denden-mushi call!? I'm afraid I don't follow? I never used the denden-mushi while on Little Garden, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hello, this is the shitty restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Would you like to make a reservation?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The response to performance

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I see... Now I understand why the Unlockies never returned...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Pumpkin-based representation: A response

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But you did manage to kill off at least one or two of them, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, umm... No, because-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Y-you see, there was an error with the intelli- genre given to me prior to!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: T-there were actually 4 pirates in the Straw- hat crew!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I uhh... I was unaware of the pirate with this I-long nose, you see...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You little piece of-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: W-Wait! Boss, would you mind explaining to me the details behind Mr. 3's failed mission!?

summary: This part develops vivi tries to carry everyone and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
